title: TRM works with Finray to deliver audit-ready crypto transaction monitoring
snippet: TRM Labs, the leading blockchain intelligence platform, today announced a partnership with Finray Technologies, a unified banking infrastructure and compliance intelligence technology company serving regulated financial institutions operating across fiat and digital-asset markets.

title: Kraken launches perpetual futures on tokenized stocks, xStocks
snippet: Crypto exchange Kraken has launched perpetual futures (perps) for 10 of its tokenized stocks, xStocks, which it acquired last year and which has since surpassed $25 billion in cumulative trading volumes. The perps track the Nasdaq and S&P indices, gold, and seven popular US stocks such as Apple, Nvi

title: ESMA warns crypto perpetual derivatives likely fall under CFD rules
snippet: The EU authority tracking compliance under the MiCA framework issued a warning to those marketing crypto derivatives as “perpetual futures or perpetual contracts.”

title: WisdomTree gets SEC approval for round-the-clock trading of tokenized MMF
snippet: The approval allows WisdomTree’s tokenized Treasury money market fund to trade and settle around the clock within the US regulatory framework.

title: Hong Kong to link new digital bond platform with regional tokenization hubs
snippet: Hong Kong will build a digital asset platform for tokenized bond issuance and settlement, while moving ahead with stablecoin licensing and CARF.

title: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta is planning stablecoin comeback in the second half amid U.S. regulatory shift - CoinDesk
snippet: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta is planning stablecoin comeback in the second half amid U.S. regulatory shift CoinDesk

title: 'Stablecoin Summer': Stripe Makes Tender Offer at $159 Billion Valuation
snippet: Payments giant Stripe made a tender offer valuing the firm at $159 billion as payments and stablecoin volumes rise.

title: WisdomTree Gets SEC Nod to Enable Instant Settlement for Tokenized Money Market Fund
snippet: WisdomTree is enabling instant settlement for its tokenized money market fund, indicating its product won't be limited by Wall Street’s pace.

title: 21shares rolls out spot SUI ETF on Nasdaq, marking the latest fund tied to Sui to launch
snippet: Another ETF tracking the price of Sui has launched this week, as digital asset manager 21shares debuts the 21Shares Spot SUI ETF.

title: GCEX Group offers GB yield through GlobalBlock
snippet: Leading regulated digital prime broker GCEX (GCEX Group) serving institutional and professional clients has launched GB Yield, a stablecoin-based yield solution designed exclusively for professional and institutional clients.

title: Hong Kong to issue first stablecoin issuer licenses next month: finance chief
snippet: Financial Secretary Paul Chan said the first licenses for fiat-referenced stablecoin issuers are expected to be approved in March.

title: Meta Hopes to Launch Stablecoin Payments Project This Year - PYMNTS.com
snippet: Meta Hopes to Launch Stablecoin Payments Project This Year PYMNTS.com

title: After Donating $35 Million to Trump PAC, Crypto.com Scores Wins From Regulators
snippet: Weeks after giving another $5 million to a pro-Trump PAC, the exchange received lawsuit aid from the CFTC and a bank charter from the Treasury Department.

title: Fintech and insurance giant TruStage pilots stablecoin geared for credit unions
snippet: TruStage and Block Time Financial are collaborating on a dollar-pegged stablecoin pilot geared for U.S. credit unions.

title: Kraken rolls out round-the-clock perps for gold, major indexes and stocks like Apple, Nvidia and Tesla
snippet: These xStocks perps will provide eligible non-U.S. clients in over 110 countries with 24/7 tokenized equities exposure.

title: Kraken rolls out crypto-style, 24/7 perpetuals trading for tokenized U.S. stocks
OpenPayd provides settlement infrastructure for LMAX Group
snippet: OpenPayd, a leading provider of financial infrastructure, has announced a partnership with LMAX Group (“LMAX”), the leading global cross-asset marketplace for FX and digital assets, to enhance settlement efficiency across its global operations.

title: What NYSE’s exploration of onchain systems means for financial markets
snippet: Tokenized securities, 24/7 trading and onchain settlement could allow the NYSE’s blockchain plans to reshape post-trade processes in financial markets.

title: Leading stablecoin Tether shrinks again as market cap looks set for second straight monthly drop
North Carolina prosecutors seize $61 million in USDT tied to ‘pig butchering’ scam
snippet: The funds were traced to crypto wallets allegedly used to launder money stolen from victims lured online to fake trading platforms.

title: BNP Paribas explores public blockchain infrastructure for money market fund tokenisation
snippet: BNP Paribas Asset Management has issued a tokenised share class of an existing French-domiciled money market fund on the public Ethereum network.

title: MoonPay launches ‘Agents,’ giving AI systems wallets and onchain cash flow
snippet: MoonPay debuts infrastructure enabling AI agents to transact with stablecoins onchain as both crypto and non-crypto companies race to build the “agent economy.”

title: Payoneer eyes federal oversight with OCC filing amid plans for a bank and new stablecoin
snippet: Payoneer filed an application with the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to establish PAYO Digital Bank and issue a stablecoin.

title: Wall Street’s big blockchain win: SEC gives WisdomTree the green light for instant, around-the-clock trading
Trump’s White House Has One View of Crypto Legislation. His Family’s Crypto Company Has Another
snippet: World Liberty Financial is backing Coinbase on the crypto market structure bill debate, even as the White House criticizes the company.

title: Coinbase, Kraken and Binance Push Deeper Into Tokenization as Capital Shifts
snippet: Tokenized real-world assets have continued to expand despite a broader market slide, with assets distributed on-chain up nearly 300% year over year.

title: Kraken debuts tokenized stock perpetual futures for non-US traders
snippet: Kraken’s new contracts, built on the xStocks framework, offer up to 20x leverage on tokenized benchmarks tied to US equities and gold.

title: Stripe's Bridge sees stablecoin volume quadruple as utility insulates from 'crypto winter'
Better, Framework Ventures reach $500M stablecoin mortgage financing deal
snippet: The deal channels crypto liquidity into US home loans, testing whether blockchain-based capital can fund traditional mortgage markets at scale.

title: Binance brings back tokenized stocks trading with Ondo Finance deal
Adam Back's BSTR moving forward with public listing plans, hopes for April approval
Stripe in Early Talks on Potential PayPal Deal: Bloomberg
snippet: The deal could combine two major payments firms already expanding into stablecoin and crypto infrastructure.

title: Stablecoins have another weakness
snippet: New research from MIT's Digital Currency Initiative shows that quality reserves aren't the only thing needed to keep stablecoins on their pegs.

title: Payoneer applies for US national trust bank charter
snippet: Cross-border payments firm Payoneer is the latest fintech to apply for a US national trust bank charter in an effort to boost its stablecoin business.

title: Coinbase CEO Pushes Back on UK Stablecoin Caps as Token Profits Surge
snippet: The proposal would cap stablecoin holdings and curb yields, a move critics say could push liquidity overseas as stablecoins become a core revenue stream.

title: US seizes $61M in USDT linked to ‘pig butchering’ crypto fraud scheme
snippet: The $61 million USDT seizure in North Carolina shows how US authorities can trace and freeze stablecoin flows tied to pig butchering scams, as AI‑driven impersonation schemes surge.

title: Facebook owner Meta eyes stablecoin integration this year: report
snippet: Last May, Fortune reported that Meta was considering a stablecoin integration to reduce the costs of payments.
